reviews.comment:
Unos ladrones. Los bizcochitos el doble que en cualquier lado, un cafe chico un 150% mas caro. Los empleados desganados. Las 2 estrellas se las pongo una por los baños y otra por el agua para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
Thieves. The pastries are twice as expensive as anywhere else, a small coffee is 150% more expensive. The staff are unmotivated. I'm giving it two stars: one for the bathrooms and one for the hot water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNLXF1am1nRRAB
